markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on Rimkus and Enable content production.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Rimkus Content Strategy:** Pivot from technical guides to high-level informational articles. This is a traffic-generation play, not a hard sell, due to legal defensibility concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [**Enable Review Bottleneck:** 12 articles are stalled in PMM review. Our process is efficient, so we are not the bottleneck. We will continue moving articles to Editorial Review to nudge the client.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [**Rimkus Pipeline Issue:** The "guaranteed outcome language" modifier in Atlas is not fully effective. This is a critical requirement for Rimkus, so manual post-processing will continue.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [**Buffer Articles:** Lawrence will create 5 buffer articles for each client this week to build a production cushion.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

## Topics

### Client: Rimkus

  - [**Content Strategy Pivot**](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
      - [**Problem:** Atlas-generated topics (titles, descriptions) are too technical and don't match the client's new direction.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
      - [**Solution:** Ignore Atlas descriptions. Focus on the keyword to create high-level, informative articles.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This soft-sell approach avoids making claims that could be indefensible in court.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [**Pipeline & Process Updates**](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [**Building Code Articles:** The current pipeline works well; no separate one is needed. Post-processing time is decreasing.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [**Guaranteed Outcome Language:** The Atlas modifier is not fully effective. Lawrence will continue manual post-processing to ensure all such language is removed.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [**Reviews:**](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
          - [Nora's edits are complete.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
          - [Jen's review is expected by EOW (Thurs/Fri).](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
          - [Lawrence will update the live tracker to maintain a clear status view.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
      - [**Topic Pipeline:** Rimkus is out of "forensic refresh" topics and will shift to "NetNew" topics. Jen owes new direction.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)

### Client: Enable

  - [**Review Bottleneck**](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [**Problem:** 12 articles are stalled in PMM review, some for a long time.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [**Action:** Lawrence is moving articles with only "editorial should change" comments to Editorial Review. This triggers an automated notification to Elaine, providing a nudge.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This maintains our efficiency and shifts the onus for delays to the client, preventing them from blaming us.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [**Content Production**](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [**PMM Feedback:** Lawrence is implementing all feedback directly, without questioning.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [**New Topics:** Matt built new MDR topics focused on the AdLumen product, awaiting Elaine's approval.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Lawrence:**](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [Create 5 buffer articles for Rimkus this week.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [Create 5 buffer articles for Enable this week (avoiding the "attack resilience" cluster).](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
      - [Update the live tracker with the latest Rimkus article statuses.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
      - [Continue moving eligible Enable articles to Editorial Review.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
      - [Follow up with Sergey on the Atlas modifier issue, CC'ing Matt and Nana.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
      - [Request clear CTA guardrails from Jen (Rimkus) to define what can be said in conclusions.](https://fathom.video/share/SUU_V_d3UueDKFaLJcw99ps6zhs_iPSy?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
